task: There is a broken script at broken.sh with a syntax error. Read it, fix the error, and write a corrected version that copies input.txt to /tmp/clive/result.txt. Execute the fixed script.
Count how many times 'apple' appears in input.txt and write the count to /tmp/clive/result.txt. The expected answer is in expected.txt — verify your result matches.
Read input.csv and find the row with the highest 'score' value. Write the name of that person to /tmp/clive/result.txt. You may use any available tool (awk, sort, python3, etc).
